title: Projects Delivered
description: Production web and mobile applications delivered for clients across fintech, real estate, automotive, and AI.
why: Volume demonstrates reliability and breadth. Each project required understanding a different domain, tech stack, and stakeholder.

title: Mobile Applications
description: Cross-platform React Native apps published on App Store and Play Store with real users.
why: Mobile development requires different discipline — performance constraints, native APIs, app store compliance. Seven apps proves depth, not just experimentation.

title: TryHackMe Ranking
description: Ranked in the top 1% of 2M+ cybersecurity professionals on TryHackMe.
why: Security is a competitive hobby that became a professional advantage. It means I build software with an understanding of how it could break.

title: Promotions
description: Promoted four times in under three years at the same company.
why: Each promotion required outgrowing my current role. The trajectory matters more than the current title — it shows I grow faster than my job description.

title: Team Leadership
description: Leading a cross-functional engineering team of 5 members.
why: Leading while still coding means I understand the work deeply enough to earn my team's respect, not just their reporting line.

title: Client Satisfaction
description: Consistently received positive feedback across delivered client projects.
why: Technical skill alone doesn't earn repeat clients. Communication, reliability, and delivery discipline matter just as much as code quality.
